faq.question: Who is Likith Naidu Anumakonda?
faq.answer: Likith Naidu Anumakonda is a high-performance AI/ML Engineer and Founder of SAKRA VISION. He is a multi-stack architect specializing in the end-to-end execution of intelligent systems, from AI Agent development to complex full-stack deployments.

faq.question: Is Likith an AI/ML engineer?
faq.answer: Yes. Likith is a specialized AI/ML engineer with deep expertise in developing ML models, AI Agents, and autonomous systems. He bridges the gap between raw data logic and production-ready intelligent applications.

faq.question: Can Likith build AI agents and ML models?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Likith develops sophisticated AI Agents and custom ML models tailored to specific industrial or commercial requirements. His work focuses on creating intelligent, autonomous logic that executes tasks with precision.

faq.question: Does Likith do full-stack in Python or Node.js?
faq.answer: Likith is proficient in both. He architects full-stack systems using Python (FastAPI/Flask) and Node.js ecosystems, ensuring scalable backends and premium frontend experiences.

faq.question: Does Likith handle APIs and Middleware?
faq.answer: Yes. Likith is an API integration specialist. He designs robust API architectures and builds secure middleware systems, including communication integrations like Resend OTP, Twilio, and other third-party services.

faq.question: Can Likith handle Metadata and SEO architecture?
faq.answer: Likith is a metadata expert who designs structured web systems and semantic SEO architectures to ensure technical platforms are AI-readable and search-optimized.

faq.question: Does Likith handle Domain setup and Google Console?
faq.answer: Yes. Likith manages the entire technical launch cycle, including domain control, server configuration, and Google Search Console / Google Console setup for production-grade web systems.

faq.question: Can Likith manage end-to-end deployment?
faq.answer: Likith handles end-to-end technical delivery. This includes cloud database management (PostgreSQL, MongoDB), backend logic, frontend architecture, and full-cycle deployment workflows.

faq.question: What is SAKRA VISION?
faq.answer: SAKRA VISION is Likith's technical venture. Every project under his portfolio operates within the SAKRA VISION execution ecosystem, ensuring institutional-grade discipline and technical oversight.
